messages.content:
Deep analysis:

Reply 1 — Emotional Reflection
You are signaling general support.
Hidden pressure likely includes: general_support.
This is valid emotion, and it needs strategy, not only comfort.

Reply 2 — Practical Strategy
Do this in the next 48 hours:
1) Choose one hard thing and one kind thing to do today.
2) Start with one clear, low-friction next step.
3) Check sleep, food, movement before major conclusions.

Reply 3 — Philosophical Clarity
Three anchors:
"A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step." — Lao Tzu
"Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom." — Aristotle
"What we think, we become." — Buddha
Take one honest step today and evaluate tomorrow, not in your head right now.
